meta.name: English
meta.siteTitle: Koçum.Net — It stays with you until exam day
meta.siteDescription: Exam preparation coaching: university placement counselling, our Mega Question Library, systematic review and one-to-one follow-up that keep what you learn fresh until exam day.

home.heroTitle: It Stays With You Until Exam Day!
home.heroSubtitle: Learning something is only the first step; making it stick takes expertise. At Koçum.Net we manage the hours after school and after cram school with systematic review and close follow-up, so that everything you learn is still with you on exam day.
home.heroBadge1: A team with 20+ years of experience
home.heroImageAlt: Student studying alone in a classroom with the exam schedule on the board
home.problemsTitle: We know the student's problem — and we build the solution
home.problemsDesc: Below are the three obstacles students most often hit during exam preparation, and how we remove them.
home.problem1Problem: They learn the topic really well at first, but as time passes — with no review — what they learned slips away fast.
home.problem1Solution: With our own system, built without rote memorisation, we keep every piece of knowledge fresh and alive until exam day.
home.problem2Problem: They wrestle with the uncertainty of “What do I study this week? Which resource do I solve questions from?” and live in constant stress and anxiety.
home.problem2Solution: We take the burden of planning and choosing resources off the student's shoulders, so they can move forward with peace of mind.
home.problem3Title: Close Follow-up After School & Cram School
home.problem3Problem: Once school or cram school ends, they struggle to discipline themselves during that unsupervised time at home.
home.problem3Solution: We manage the hours after school and cram school professionally. With our plan–review–follow-up triangle, we never leave the student alone in the exam marathon.
home.aboutTeaserTitle: Your most trusted companion in the exam marathon
home.aboutBadgeText: We are with you after school and cram school too
home.ctaDesc: Get in touch to learn more about our services or about how to enrol.
home.ctaImageAlt: Young people working together at a table

about.title: About Us
about.metaDescription: Koçum.Net: a team of university placement counsellors, student coaches, a clinical psychologist and a dietitian, each with more than 20 years of experience. Our mission, our vision and our expert team.
about.heroSubtitle: We combine deep experience with personalised guidance, removing the clutter and the stress from exam preparation.
about.whoHeading: Your most trusted companion in the exam marathon
about.whoBody: Koçum.Net was founded by expert university placement and career counsellors, professional student coaches, a specialist clinical psychologist, a specialist dietitian and exam preparation experts — each with more than 20 years of experience in the field. We are a senior team with deep expertise in producing new-generation exam preparation material, above all in mathematics.
about.whoClosing: With this experienced team, which has shaped every stage of education, career planning, psychological resilience and healthy nutrition before the exam, we are students' most trusted companion in the exam marathon.
about.missionBody: To manage the time students have after school and after cram school with the right planning, systematic review and one-to-one follow-up, so that they achieve lasting, peaceful success far from rote memorisation.
about.visionBody: To become Türkiye's most trusted digital education and coaching brand by combining experience with personalised guidance models, eliminating the confusion and stress that can arise during exam preparation.
about.teamDesc: We work with the most experienced names in every dimension of the exam process.
about.imageAlt: An education coach giving one-to-one guidance to a student

services.title: Services
services.metaDescription: Koçum.Net services: placement counselling, the Mega Question Library, exam study coaching, student coaching, psychological support and nutrition counselling during the exam period.
services.heroSubtitle: From placement counselling to our own question library, from study coaching to psychological support and nutrition — we stand beside our student at every stage of the exam process.
services.ctaTitle: Let's find the right service for you, together
services.ctaDesc: Contact us for detailed information about our services and the enrolment process.
services.tercihP1: Choosing a university and a department is not a listing exercise based on scores alone; it is the process of building a future. Led by our Placement Counsellor Serhat Butur — one of the most experienced names in the country — we present the most suitable alternatives, taking the socio-economic circumstances of students and families into account.
services.tercihP2: We analyse universities' hidden academic opportunities, the depth of their faculty and the critical details that usually go unnoticed, and we guide our student towards the future where they will gain the most.
services.tercihImageAlt: Students walking across a modern university campus
services.materyalP1: In mathematics above all, we offer our “Mega Question Library”. Our resources do not contain a single question that “steals the student's time, is needlessly difficult, or has drifted away from the curriculum”. We prepare highly selective, student-friendly niche publications that match the spirit and the format of the ÖSYM exam exactly — the kind of question that makes you say, “this could come up in the exam”.
services.materyalP2: We bring students a level of selectivity and usefulness that even the most popular resources on the market could not deliver together, all under one roof. We present our solutions in a format different from most publishers. With this solution format, our students can quickly see exactly where they got stuck, without needing extra help.
services.materyalImageAlt: A student's hand marking an optical answer sheet with a pencil
services.koclukP1: Exam preparation is won or lost after school or cram school — in that unsupervised stretch of time the student spends at home. With our Exam Study Coaching system, we never leave the student alone in this marathon:
services.koclukBullet1Text: We prevent topics from being forgotten over time by building a systematic review mechanism based on logic, not on rote memorisation.
services.koclukBullet2Text: We put an end to the “What do I study this week, which resource do I use?” stress. With our Mega Question Library, choosing a resource is no longer a worry. All that is left for the student is to move forward calmly.
services.koclukBullet3Text: We remove the need for students to discipline themselves, coordinating the process professionally through the triangle of planning, review and follow-up.
services.koclukImageAlt: A planner with the monthly study schedule and a marker pen
services.ogrenciExpert: Our Student Coaches Özlem Tamimi and Serhat Butur
services.ogrenciP1: In this dedicated service — aimed above all at students in years 9, 10, 11 and 12 as well as graduates retaking the exam — we work under the guidance of our student coaches Özlem Tamimi and Serhat Butur. We support our students with time management, study techniques, coping with exam stress, academic motivation and goal setting.
services.ogrenciP2: We produce answers to the questions on our student's mind: “How do I study more efficiently for exams?”, “How do I improve my school results?”, “What kind of programme should I follow to reach my goal?”
services.ogrenciImageAlt: A high-school student taking notes at a laptop while wearing headphones
services.psikolojikTitle: Psychological Support During the Exam Period
services.psikolojikP1: The exam marathon is not only an academic process; it is also a serious test of mental and emotional resilience. Led by our specialist Clinical Psychologist Dilek Kılıç — well known for her work and videos in the digital world — we professionally support our students through exam anxiety, loss of motivation and stress management.
services.psikolojikP2: We provide a space of psychological safety on this difficult journey, for our student and for the family alike.
services.psikolojikImageAlt: A young student talking with a specialist psychologist in a comfortable setting
services.beslenmeTitle: Nutrition Counselling During the Exam Period
services.beslenmeP1: The exam marathon demands physical endurance. To build that endurance, we offer our students personalised nutrition programmes together with our specialist dietitian Serap Orak.
services.beslenmeP2: By producing professional answers to students' questions about eating habits during the exam period, we keep their energy levels steady.
services.beslenmeImageAlt: Healthy breakfast bowls prepared with fruit and oats

contact.title: Contact
contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Koçum.Net. Reach us for information and enrolment regarding exam preparation coaching, placement counselling and study material.
contact.heroSubtitle: At Koçum.Net we remove physical boundaries, offering full-time support in the digital world to our students all across Türkiye.
contact.reachBody: From exam preparation to coaching, from choosing material to psychological support, we run every one of our processes on our professional online infrastructure. To ask a question, get detailed information about our services or learn about enrolment, you can reach us at any time through the channels below.
contact.note: Our social media accounts and the messages we receive are managed and answered personally by our Placement Counsellor and Founder, Serhat Butur.
contact.formDesc: You can reach us by filling in the form.
contact.quickThanks: Thank you. We have received your message and will get back to you as soon as possible.
